args:
set -eu
bundle_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$bundle_dir" --warmup-scope prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
grep -q '"name":"prefill_attention"' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"
if grep -q 'decode_attention' "$bundle_dir/buildplan.json"; then
  echo 'unexpected decode scope in warmup-scoped buildplan' >&2
  exit 1
fi
printf 'warmup-scoped-build\n'
